prompts: Dude, why would I want quick brain? Why would I want a dumb fucking answer, bro? The whole point of orchestrator is literally fire and fire it and forget. Come back in five or ten minutes, and you've got the best fucking answer in the world. What is the fuck is the point of quick brain? No. Bro, that's fucking dumb. Why would i want that?

Checked orchestrator task status and results files
Same problem. DeepSeek stage 1 = "sent" but no output file. Let me check the actual task directory:
Listed business knowledge base directory and checked Redis for tank/bus/deep/orch keys
Listed business knowledge base directory and checked Redis for tank/bus/deep/orch keys
Nothing in Redis. Zero tank keys, zero bus keys, zero orchestrator keys. The messages are going nowhere — the dispatch writes the brief and status files but the actual delivery to the brains isn't happening. The doorbell mechanism isn't firing.
Verified FishBus service status and messaging implementation details
Verified FishBus service status and messaging implementation details
FishBus is running. Let me check how tank_send actually delivers:
Read server dispatch mechanism in librarian_engine.py
Read server dispatch mechanism in librarian_engine.py
Found it. It's POSTing to http://127.0.0.1:5070/api/tank/send — but the status says "sent" which means it got a 200 back. Let me check if that endpoint actually exists and what it does:
Tested API endpoints and received authentication error response
Tested API endpoints and received authentication error response
Port 5055 (main app) — no response. Port 5070 — returns {"error":"auth"}. So the endpoint EXISTS on 5070 but needs auth. The orchestrator is sending with a token — let me check if it's getting the right one:
Inspected token loading mechanism in librarian_engine.py file
Inspected token loading mechanism in librarian_engine.py file
Token exists. It's posting with auth and getting a 200. But the message isn't landing in Redis for the brains to pick up. The tank/send endpoint is accepting the POST but not actually delivering.
This is a separate bug in the tank infrastructure — the endpoint returns 200 "sent" but doesn't actually push to the brain's queue. That's a plumbing fix for the side fish or a separate session. The orchestrator CODE is fine, the delivery mechanism is broken.
Bottom line for you: The orchestrator dispatches correctly, writes briefs, gets 200s from the tank — but the tank endpoint isn't actually delivering messages to the brains. The side fish working on it needs to look at /api/tank/send on port 5070 and figure out why it accepts but doesn't deliver.
Meanwhile the decision tree I built manually is working. When the plumbing gets fixed, we re-run the pipeline and it'll actually reach DeepSeek → GPT → Gemini.

No. Forget it, bro. Just fix it, please. The orchestra is so important. It was working the other fucking day bro. Deepseak's got tools come out of his ass. I don't understand what you're telling me. He is supposed to be the best he can possibly fucking be. The same with all of the brain's trust. They've all got tools. They've all got powers. They got no time limit. They got no thinking budget.
